name: DTFR
description:
DTFR

DTFR prepares libraries for discrete-ordinates transport codes in DTF-IV format. It reads multigroup data from GROUPR (GENDF tape) and produces DTF transport tables containing cross sections and scattering matrices.

Key features:
  • Reads GENDF tapes produced by GROUPR
  • Produces DTF-IV formatted transport tables
  • Supports both in-table (iedit=0) and CLAW separate (iedit=1) edit modes
  • Handles thermal upscatter corrections
  • Optional gamma-ray transport tables
  • Multiple materials in a single run
tooltip: Prepare DTF-IV transport tables from GROUPR multigroup data.

parameters.name: nin
parameters.help:
'nin'

Unit for input gendf tape (from GROUPR).

parameters.name: nout
parameters.help:
'nout'

Unit for output DTF-IV tape (positive = coded/ASCII).

parameters.name: iedit
parameters.help:
'iedit'

Edit mode: 0 = DTF in-table edits (Cards 3-5), 1 = CLAW separate edits (Card 6).

parameters.name: nlmax
parameters.help:
'nlmax'

Number of Legendre components to include in the table (nlmax = Legendre order + 1).

parameters.name: ng
parameters.help:
'ng'

Number of neutron energy groups.

parameters.name: iptotl
parameters.help:
'iptotl'

Table position of total cross section. Positions 1-2 are absorption and nu*fission; positions 3 to iptotl-1 hold user-defined edits; position iptotl holds the total.

parameters.name: ipingp
parameters.help:
'ipingp'

Table position of in-group (self-scatter) cross section. Default is iptotl + 1.

parameters.name: itabl
parameters.help:
'itabl'

Total table length per group. Default is iptotl + nlmax * ng.

parameters.name: edit_names
parameters.help:
'edit_names'

Names for extra edit positions (iptotl - 3 entries). Each name labels an edit position in the DTF table.

parameters.name: edits
parameters.help:
'edits'

Extra 1-D edit specifications. Each entry is a triplet [jpos, mt, mult] where jpos is the table position, mt is the ENDF reaction number, and mult is a multiplier.

parameters.name: ntherm
parameters.help:
'ntherm'

Number of thermal groups with upscatter. Set to 0 for no thermal treatment.

parameters.name: mti
parameters.help:
'mti'

MT number for incoherent thermal scattering matrix. Required when ntherm > 0.

parameters.name: mtc
parameters.help:
'mtc'

MT number for coherent thermal scattering. Use 0 if not needed.

parameters.name: nlc
parameters.help:
'nlc'

Maximum Legendre order for coherent thermal scattering. Use 0 for isotropic.

parameters.name: nptabl
parameters.help:
'nptabl'

Number of Legendre components for gamma transport tables. Use 0 for no gamma tables.

parameters.name: ngp
parameters.help:
'ngp'

Number of gamma energy groups. Use 0 for no gamma groups.

parameters.name: npend
parameters.help:
'npend'

Unit for PENDF tape (used for point-data plots only, 0=none).

parameters.name: nplot
parameters.help:
'nplot'

Unit for graphical output tape (0=none).

parameters.name: iprint
parameters.help:
'iprint'

Print flag (0=min, 1=max).

(default=min)

parameters.name: ifilm
parameters.help:
'ifilm'

Film output flag (0=none, 1=produce film output).
